summary: Iteration 29: Chatbot UI testing complete. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend Chat page and Chat Widget both working correctly with confidence-aware badges (Verified Match/Partial Match/No Match) and WhatsApp handoff banners for non-high confidence responses.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - chatbot endpoints are public
seed_data_creation: None - using existing shadow_* collections with 481 products, 5107 SKUs, 654 chunks, 100 brands
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chatbot feature fully functional. Backend RAG uses keyword matching against shadow_chunks collection. Confidence levels: high (match_ratio >= 0.6, max_score >= 4), medium (match_ratio >= 0.4, max_score >= 2), low/none (below thresholds or off-topic). Session history persisted in chatbot_conversations collection. Telemetry logged to chatbot_telemetry collection.

GET /api/chatbot/history/{session_id}.after_query: PASS - Returns user and assistant messages with confidence

GET /api/chatbot/suggestions.returns_5_suggestions: PASS - Returns 5 medical device related suggestions

backend_api.GET /api/chatbot/products: PASS - Returns product list with filtering

frontend_chat_page.confidence_badge_high: PASS - Green 'Verified Match' badge on welcome
frontend_chat_page.send_message: PASS - Input and send button work
frontend_chat_page.biomime_query: PASS - Returns product info with 'Verified Match' badge
frontend_chat_page.handoff_banner: PASS - WhatsApp link shown for non-high confidence

frontend_chat_widget.floating_button: PASS - Visible at bottom-right of homepage
frontend_chat_widget.knee_implants_query: PASS - Returns SKU codes with handoff link
frontend_chat_widget.off_topic_query: PASS - Shows 'No Match' badge and handoff banner
